original_image_tags: A blue ink stamp in the lower right corner of the document. The stamp is rectangular and reads "FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION" at the top. Below that, "U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE". The date "AUG 30 1947" is stamped in the center. The bottom line reads "SAN FRANCISCO" and "ROUTED TO". There is a handwritten initial or symbol to the right of "ROUTED TO".

elements.description: One blue rectangular ink stamp in the bottom right corner. Text within the stamp reads 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION', 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE', 'AUG 30 1947', 'SAN FRANCISCO', and 'ROUTED TO' with a handwritten initial below it.
One small red ink stamp at the bottom center of the page, reading 'ENCLOSURE'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a single blue FBI stamp in the lower right corner and quote identical text within it, with Description B also noting an additional red 'ENCLOSURE' stamp which does not contradict Description A.
